focus: Batch-audit the phase-016/017/018-adjacent P1 clusters around path boundaries, code-graph readiness, canonical-save freshness, and Unicode/NFKC sanitization.

graphEvents.detail: Six code-graph sibling asymmetry findings moved to ADDRESSED via readiness-contract extraction/propagation commits 175ad87c98, 4a154c5559, and f253194bf7.
Three canonical-save freshness findings moved to SUPERSEDED by the phase-017 metadata refresh plus continuity validator path (32a180bba).
Two Unicode/NFKC sanitization findings moved to ADDRESSED via shared-provenance extraction (77da3013af) and confusable-folding hardening (a131c2193).

Two resolveDatabasePaths boundary findings remain STILL_OPEN on current main; validator path-steering, skill_graph_scan attribution, graph-metadata key-file attribution, and the trigger-phrase sanitizer residual remain UNVERIFIED.
